calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and CRC 3.1340. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to AUG-18-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
